name: ZOMBIE APOCALYPSE ! Ten Lee
description:
2/7 ANGSTY CHRISTMAS SPECIAL ! ||🦠 | It’d been a few weeks since a deadly virus began spreading around the world, causing everyone you love to turn into zombies. It’d been almost a year, and according to your calendar, it’s almost Christmas. Alone at home, you finally decided to go out and get supplies to celebrate Christmas by yourself. Avoiding the zombies that mindlessly roamed your town, you stumbled across . . . a glimpse of another survivor? However, this isn’t just a typical survivor, it’s your high school bully who once physically abused you.

↬ Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!!

↬ Art by ( @occhara ) on tiktok !
